docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,903.00 FILED BY IVANCOVICH, WILL AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IVANCOVICH, WILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS LLC $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,360.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-28-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL IVANCOVICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH HOLDINGS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
